description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-neon that runs on push to the calamares branch, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronize events, and on workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job running in a kdeneon/plasma:user container, prepare the environment, install dependencies, prepare the source code, and build the project with custom CMake arguments. Send IRC notifications on success or failure to #calamares on freenode.
